context: Evaluates the agent's ability to run pairwise duplication analysis across a skills portfolio, assign numeric similarity scores, apply threshold-based actions, recommend consolidation with the Navigation Hub pattern, and reject cross-domain merging.

checklist.name: Full pair analysis
checklist.description: All relevant skill pairs analysed, not just a subset

checklist.name: Numeric similarity scoring
checklist.description: Similarity scores calculated for each pair

checklist.name: Consolidation recommendations
checklist.description: Consolidation recommendation provided for each high-similarity pair

checklist.name: Summary statistics
checklist.description: Summary statistics included (total pairs, critical/warning counts)
